LAW AND MOTION, 302, NO APPEARANCE ON THIS MATTER. THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT IS OVERRULED. PLAINTIFF PLED SUFFICIENT FACTS TO PUT DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH DBA MERCY MEDICAL CENTER REDDING ON NOTICE OF THE CLAIMS AGAINST IT AND ALLOW IT TO BEGIN PREPARING A DEFENSE. MASTER CALENDAR JURY

MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication
Off Calendar Dec-02-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT Or, In The Alternative, Summary Adjudication IS Granted. No opposition filed. The prevailing party is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the tentative ruling and in compliance with Code of Civil Procedure 437c(g). Judge: A. James Robertson II, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-12-2013 Set For Trial On Jan-06-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-06-2013 Continued To Mar-27-13 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Jan-23-2013 Overruled
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT DIGNITY HEALTH's DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is Overruled. Plaintiff pled sufficient facts to put Defendant Dignity Health dba Mercy Medical Center Redding on notice of the claims against it and allow it to begin preparing a defense. (Prevailing party to prepare a form of order which complies with CRC 3.1312.) Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Court Reporter: Anthony C. Vaughn, CSR # 6185
